examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: client_secret authentication with an empty base URL, client ID, and client secret. jsonData.base_url, jsonData.client_id, and secureJsonData.client_secret must all be filled in to get a working datasource.

clientSecret.description: Authenticate against a Looker instance with API3 credentials: jsonData.client_id plus secureJsonData.client_secret, connecting to jsonData.base_url. auth_type is 'client_secret' (the only supported method).
